name: No-Frying Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a corn tortilla on the gas burner flame over medium heat.
2. Quickly turn the tortilla with tongs for a few seconds using the flame.
3. Fold the tortilla in half and fill it with lean beef cooked with diced green pepper, well-drained.
4. Add half of a chopped Ortega Anaheim chili, shredded Alpine Lace cheese (free and lean), shredded lettuce, and tomato.
5. Finish with a generous amount of La Victoria hot sauce.
6. Serve immediately with your favorite Mexican beer or Herdez brand salsa for added flavor.
Enjoy your no-frying tacos every Saturday night!
